identifiers.note: internal_id is the bdlaws database identifier, not the legal citation number

content_raw:
The Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) (Repeal) Act, 1974 

                        
                        
                    
                    
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                             (
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                            ACT
                                        
                                        NO. IX OF 1974
                                    
                                

                                )

An Act to repeal the Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) Ordinance, 1966.

                                    
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                        
                            
                            
                                    	WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) Ordinance, 1966 (E.P. Ord. IV of 1966);                             It is hereby enacted as follows:-

An Act to repeal the Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) Ordinance, 1966.

Short title and commencement
1. (1) This Act may be called the Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) (Repeal) Act, 1974.    	(2) It shall come into force at once.

Repeal
2. The Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) Ordinance, 1966 (E.P. Ord. IV of 1966) is hereby repealed.
